steps.title: Identify the defining effect of romantic paintings
steps.content: The key clue is altering subjects to appear more beautiful or heroic than they actually were. This reveals that the romantic style exaggerated or amplified the positive qualities beyond their true appearance.

steps.title: Find the word meaning to exaggerate or amplify
steps.content: Magnify means to make something appear larger, greater, or more significant than it actually is—exactly what the passage describes romantic paintings doing to their subjects' positive traits. Rectify (correct), counteract (oppose), and apprehend (understand or arrest) don't capture the idea of amplifying appearance. That matches choice C — C is correct.
